rule: Any Agent must pass admission, minimum task-scoped authorization, evidence verification, budget control, audit, and revocation.

immutable_principles.rule: Agent Card describes capability; it never grants authority.
Every dispatch requires a task-bound Grant, explicit data scope, tool allowlist, budget, verifier, and stop conditions.
Secrets, full memory, raw private data, unrestricted workspace paths, and hidden reasoning never cross an Agent contract.
Unknown, expired, revoked, over-budget, drifted, or unverified work is denied or frozen.
L4 actions require original-data reload, preflight snapshot, explicit confirmation, rollback, and post-change verification.
Terminal tasks and receipts are immutable; revisions create new IDs referencing prior artifacts.
Governance changes are candidate-first and require replay, holdout, latency, safety evaluation, and human promotion.
Core Harness files are read-only; new governance capabilities use approved Overlay paths.
Memory reads are task-, grant-, agent-, state-view-, and scope-bound; full memory is forbidden and L4 decisions reload the original source.
New Agent or pipeline complexity requires measured independent benefit, explicit input/output contracts, failure terminals, simulation evidence, independent verification, and rollback.
